LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE ORDER AND CONSENT JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. DEPUTY: NOT PRESENT. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Hearing re: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL ESPINOZA's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

The order and consent judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Not present. Matter not reported.
(302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-20-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
